docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ERIN S. MCGAHEY IN SUPPORT OF RESPONDENT DEVCON CONSTRUCTION, INCORPORATED S OPPOSITION TO JUSTIN BOLLS PETITION TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF WILLIAM BOLLS BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION (TRANSACTION ID # 63108081) FILED BY RESPONDENT DEVCON CONSTRUCTION, INCORPORATED

ASBESTOS DISCOVERY 503, PETITIONER JUSTIN BOLLS NOTICE OF HEARING RE: TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF WILLIAM BOLLS BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION. HEARING IS HELD. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DISCOVERY REQUESTED MAY PREVENT A FAILURE OR DELAY OF JUSTICE. (CCP 2035.050(A).) RESPONDENT DEVCON'S REQUEST FOR AN INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAM PRIOR TO MR. BOLLS' DEPOSITION IS DENIED AT THIS TIME. THE COURT SIGNS AN ORDER WHICH ADOPTS THE AMENDMENTS MADE BY COUNSEL AFTER THEIR MEET AND CONFER EFFORTS THIS MORNING. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: KELLY M. ROEMER, CSR 6435 (AIKEN WELCH, TEL: 877.451.1580)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Justin Bolls To Perpetuate Testimony Of William Bolls By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JUSTIN BOLLS NOTICE OF HEARING RE: TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF WILLIAM BOLLS BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION.

Appearances: James Ghilotti of Brayton Purcell LLP (415.898.1555) for petitioner and moving party; Carrie S. Lin of Manning Gross & Massenburg LLP (415.512.4381) appearing via Court Call for the Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company; Erin McGahey of Sinunu Bruni LLP (415.362.9700) for Devcon Construction Inc.

Prior to the hearing, counsel meet and confer. Hearing is held. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. The Court finds that the discovery requested may prevent a failure or delay of justice. (CCP 2035.050(a).) Respondent Devcon's request for an Independent Medical Exam prior to Mr. Bolls' deposition is denied at this time. The Court signs an order which adopts the amendments made by counsel after their meet and confer efforts. Judge: Cynthia M. Lee, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Kelly M. Roemer, CSR 6435 (Aiken Welch, Tel: 877.451.1580) (503/CML)
